name: postgres-backend
description: PostgresBackend class implementing IBackend. Wraps SqlBackend (compile) + ISqlExecutor (execute). execute() method: compiles query via SqlBackend, executes via ISqlExecutor, normalizes results via snakeToCamel. Provides unified interface matching MemoryBackend pattern.
rationale: REQ-12 postgres-queryable-implementation. Bridges SqlBackend compilation with BunSqlExecutor execution.
